Kql: datatable(x:long, y:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ] | extend tmp = x | extend x = y | extend y = tmp | project-away tmp | extend z = x - y | project x, y, z | sort by z asc
Sql: SELECT x, y, z FROM (SELECT *, x - y AS z FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (tmp) FROM (SELECT *, tmp AS y FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (x), y AS x FROM (SELECT *, x AS tmp FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x, y)))))) ORDER BY z ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "abc", "", "x" ] | extend n=tostring(dynamic(null)) | summarize ml=make_list(n), ms=make_set(s), cn=countif(isnull(n)), ce=countif(isempty(n))
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(LIST(n) FILTER (WHERE n IS NOT NULL), []) AS ml, COALESCE(LIST(DISTINCT s) FILTER (WHERE s IS NOT NULL), []) AS ms, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (n IS NULL)) AS cn, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (n IS NULL OR CAST(n AS VARCHAR) = '')) AS ce FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS n FROM (VALUES ('abc'), (''), ('x')) AS t(s))

Kql: print a=iif(isnull(int(null)) and isempty(""), strcat("p",tostring(int(null)),"q"), "x"), b=coalesce(strcat(tostring(real(null))), "fb")
Sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) IS NULL) AND ('' IS NULL OR CAST('' AS VARCHAR) = '') THEN CONCAT('p', TRY_CAST(CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS TEXT), 'q') ELSE 'x' END AS a, COALESCE(CONCAT(TRY_CAST(CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS TEXT)), 'fb') AS b

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, long(null) ] | where not(x == 1) | count
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) WHERE NOT (x = 1)

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, long(null) ] | where x !in (1, 2) | count
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) WHERE x NOT IN (1, 2)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a", "", "b" ] | extend n=tostring(dynamic(null)) | where s == n | count
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS n FROM (VALUES ('a'), (''), ('b')) AS t(s)) WHERE s = n

Kql: datatable(x:real)[ 1.5, real(null), 2.5 ] | extend b=bin(x, 1.0), f=floor(x, 0.5), c=ceiling(x) | project x, b, f, c | order by x asc nulls last
Sql: SELECT x, b, f, c FROM (SELECT *, FLOOR((x)/(1.0))*(1.0) AS b, FLOOR(x) AS f, CEILING(x) AS c FROM (VALUES (CAST(1.5 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(2.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(x)) ORDER BY x DESC NULLS LAST

Kql: datatable(x:int)[ ] | extend y=int(null) | summarize m=make_list(y), mb=make_bag(pack("k", y))
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(LIST(y) FILTER (WHERE y IS NOT NULL), []) AS m, histogram(json_object('k', y)) AS mb FROM (SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS y FROM (SELECT NULL AS x WHERE 1 = 0))
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=([], {}) duck=([], null)

Kql: print s=strcat_array(dynamic(["a", null, "", "b"]), "|"), j=strcat_array(dynamic([null, null]), ","), l=array_length(dynamic([null,null]))
Sql: SELECT ARRAY_TO_STRING(LIST_VALUE('a', NULL, '', 'b'), '|') AS s, ARRAY_TO_STRING(LIST_VALUE(NULL, NULL), ',') AS j, LEN(LIST_VALUE(NULL, NULL)) AS l

Sql: SELECT TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 23:59:59.999999' AS t1, TIMESTAMP '0001-01-01 00:00:00' + ((1 / 10.0) * INTERVAL '1 microsecond') AS t2, TIMESTAMP '9999-12-31 00:00:00' - TIMESTAMP '0001-01-01 00:00:00' AS diff, TIMESTAMP '0001-01-01 00:00:00' - ((1 / 10.0) * INTERVAL '1 microsecond') AS neg

Kql: datatable(t:datetime)[ datetime(2020-01-01), datetime(null) ] | extend a=t+timespan(null), b=t-1d, w=dayofweek(t), m=monthofyear(t) | project t, a, b, w, m | order by t asc nulls first
Sql: SELECT t, a, b, w, m FROM (SELECT *, t + CAST(NULL AS INTERVAL) AS a, t - (86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond') AS b, (EXTRACT(DOW FROM t) * INTERVAL '1 day') AS w, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t) AS m FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00'), (CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP))) AS t(t)) ORDER BY t DESC NULLS LAST
Detail: rows match as a set but order differs

Kql: datatable(t:datetime, s:timespan)[ datetime(2020-01-01),timespan(null), datetime(null),1d ] | extend e=t+s, ts=tostring(s), tt=tostring(t) | project t, s, e, ts, tt
Sql: SELECT t, s, e, ts, tt FROM (SELECT *, t + s AS e, TRY_CAST(s AS TEXT) AS ts, TRY_CAST(t AS TEXT) AS tt FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00', CAST(NULL AS INTERVAL)), (CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP), (86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond'))) AS t(t, s))

Kql: print a=tolong(int(null)), b=toint(long(null)), c=todouble(int(null)), d=tostring(toint("")), e=tolong(todouble("inf"))
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS a, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS b, COALESCE(TRY_CAST(CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(CAST(NULL AS INTEGER) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS c, TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS TEXT) AS d, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('inf' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('inf' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('inf' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('inf' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS e

Kql: datatable(b:bool)[ true, false, bool(null) ] | extend i=toint(b), s=tostring(b), n=not(b), a=b and true, o=b or false | project b, i, s, n, a, o | order by b asc nulls last
Sql: SELECT b, i, s, n, a, o FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(b AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(b AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS i, TRY_CAST(b AS TEXT) AS s, NOT (b) AS n, b AND TRUE AS a, b OR FALSE AS o FROM (VALUES (TRUE), (FALSE), (FALSE)) AS t(b)) ORDER BY b DESC NULLS LAST

Kql: datatable(g:string, x:long)[ "a",long(null), "a",2, "b",long(null), "b",long(null) ] | sort by g asc, x desc nulls first | extend rn=row_number(0, g!=prev(g)) | project g, x, rn
Sql: SELECT g, x, rn FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST, x DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM (VALUES ('a', CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), ('a', CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(g, x) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST, x DESC NULLS LAST)

Kql: datatable(k:long)[ long(null), long(null), 1 ] | summarize c=count() by k | order by k asc nulls first
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS c FROM (VALUES (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k DESC NULLS LAST

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 0, long(null), -1 ] | extend d=10/x, m=10%x | project x, d, m | order by x asc nulls last
Sql: SELECT x, d, m FROM (SELECT *, CAST(TRUNC(CAST(10 AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(x, 0)) AS BIGINT) AS d, (((10) % NULLIF(x, 0)) + ABS(x)) % NULLIF(x, 0) AS m FROM (VALUES (CAST(0 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), (CAST(-1 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)) ORDER BY x DESC NULLS LAST
Detail: rows match as a set but order differs

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "O'Brien", "a\"b", "tab\ttab", "" ] | extend l=strlen(s), u=toupper(s), sub=substring(s, 1, 100), c=countof(s, "b") | project s, l, u, sub, c
Sql: SELECT s, l, u, sub, c FROM (SELECT *, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS l, UPPER(s) AS u, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (1) + 1, 100) AS sub, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, 'b', ''))) / LENGTH('b') AS c FROM (VALUES ('O''Brien'), ('a\"b'), ('tab\ttab'), ('')) AS t(s))

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "100", "200", "abc", "10.5" ] | search "1*" and not("abc") | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (SELECT 'search_arg0' AS "$table", * FROM (VALUES ('100'), ('200'), ('abc'), ('10.5')) AS t(s) WHERE (REGEXP_MATCHES(LOWER(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)), '(^|[^A-Za-z0-9])1\*([^A-Za-z0-9]|$)') AND (NOT REGEXP_MATCHES(LOWER(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)), '(^|[^A-Za-z0-9])abc([^A-Za-z0-9]|$)'))))
